title: CompSoc Vanilla Enhanced
description: Suggested mods for playing on the Computer Society's vanilla Minecraft server. These mods are not required, but provide a better experience playing vanilla Minecraft.
body:
# Computer Society Vanilla Enhanced Modpack
The purpose of this modpack is to be used by members of the University of Limerick's Computer Society to play on the society's vanilla Minecraft server. We recommend you download this modpack to enhance the vanilla Minecraft experience by adding unobtrusive features.

# What is included
This modpack includes general quality of life mods to make any multiplayer vanilla experiance better, such as a map with waypoints, a log of deaths and in-game voice chat.

# Where I can use this modpack
While the UL Computer Society's Minecraft server is only open to members, this modpack is perfect for playing on any singleplayer world or other vanilla Minecraft servers.

# Included mods
## From Modirnth.com:
- [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby)
- [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling)
- [Dynamic Torches](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dynamic-torches)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [FPS Reducer](https://modrinth.com/mod/fps-reducer)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [ItemSwapper](https://modrinth.com/plugin/itemswapper)
- [Lighty](https://modrinth.com/mod/lighty)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium)
- [oωo](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)
- [Preventer](https://modrinth.com/mod/preventer)
- [Quilted Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl)
- [Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)
- [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)
- [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus)
- [Voice Chat Soundboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/voicechat-soundboard)
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap)

## From CurseForge.com:
- [SuperBetterGrass](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/super-better-grass)
